title: Implement shared native client protocol model for Python TUI
description: Why this exists: BLE and IP/CoAP paths must expose the same behavior to the TUI instead of creating two separate apps. What needs to be done: define Python client interfaces for connect, identify node, get status, get/set config, list mesh peers, send message, receive message, subscribe logs, diagnostics, and disconnect. Reuse or extend existing python/src/lichen/interface native protocol code where appropriate. Acceptance criteria: shared app-facing model exists; BLE and IP adapters can implement it; message and status types are typed; error/result codes preserve firmware details; unit tests cover model parsing and normalization.
notes: Implemented shared Python native LCI client model for TUI/app adapters. Added typed app models, packet/resource transport protocols, lifecycle connect/disconnect, identity/status/config/radio reads, config/radio PUT helpers, spec-shaped neighbor/route normalization, message send/inbox handling, Observe subscription handles for inbox/log streams, diagnostics fetch, CoRE link-format parser, and unit tests. Files: python/src/lichen/client/{__init__.py,model.py,transport.py,lci.py}; python/tests/client/{__init__.py,test_lci.py}. Validation on local Python environment: cd python && uv run ruff check src/lichen/client tests/client -> PASS; cd python && uv run mypy src/lichen/client tests/client -> PASS (Success: no issues found in 6 source files); cd python && uv run pytest tests/client -q -> PASS (11 passed in 0.04s); git diff --check -> PASS. EC2/Zephyr not used for this Python-only no-hardware slice. Code review: two independent reviewers initially found P1/P2 issues: spec-shaped neighbor/route maps and fields, default outbound /msg path, missing lifecycle/config/log/diagnostic API, Observe stream handle, and escaped quote handling in link-format parsing. All were fixed. Final reviews from Erdos and Banach reported no P0/P1/P2 findings. Residual follow-up risk: no direct IP/BLE adapter conformance or real aiocoap Observe integration yet; later transport Beads cover adapters.
close_reason: Completed shared Python native LCI client model with typed models, transport/subscription protocols, spec-aligned normalization, unit tests, passing checks, and clean final reviews.
